message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFCC
skinparam noteBorderColor #CCCC99
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #9370DB
skinparam participantPadding 5
skinparam lifelineBackgroundColor #F0F8FF
skinparam lifelineBorderColor #4682B4

actor "참가자" as participant
participant "깃헙 리포지토리" as repo
participant "깃헙 액션" as action
actor "운영자" as operator
participant "파워 오토메이트" as powerautomate
database "데이터베이스" as db

== PR ==
participant -> repo: PR 생성
note right of participant: GHA 챌린지 완료 인증샷
repo -> action: 이벤트 생성
action -> repo: 라벨 추가: review-required

== REVIEW ==
operator -> operator: 리뷰
operator -> repo: 라벨 추가: review-completed
operator -> repo: 라벨 삭제: review-required
operator -> repo: 코멘트: /ghasignoff
repo -> action: 이벤트 생성
note left of repo: 지정된 사용자만\n이벤트 생성 가능

action -> powerautomate: 호출
note right of action: GitHub ID\nPR 본문\n제출시간
powerautomate -> db: 레코드 조회
note left of db: GitHub ID

alt 레코드 있음
    powerautomate -> db: 레코드 업데이트
    note right of db: PR ID
    powerautomate -> action: 호출
    action -> repo: 라벨 추가: record-updated
    action -> repo: 라벨 추가: completed-gha
    action -> repo: 라벨 삭제: review-completed
    action -> repo: PR 머지
    note right of db: 업데이트 완료
    powerautomate -> participant: 확인 이메일
else 레코드 없음
    powerautomate -> action: 호출
    note right of db: PR ID
    action -> repo: 라벨 추가: review-required
    action -> repo: 라벨 삭제: review-completed
    note right of db: 레코드 없음
    powerautomate -> participant: 확인 이메일
end

@enduml
```
